message:
fix: handle overseer address in notification routing (gt-afthf)

addressToSessionIDs returned nil for overseer address, so tmux
notifications were never delivered to the human operator. Added
OverseerSessionName (hq-overseer) and overseer handling in both
addressToSessionIDs and notifyRecipient. Uses SendNotificationBanner
instead of NudgeSession for the overseer since typing into a human
terminal would be disruptive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
